case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. DAMARYS L GAITAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $459.02 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT GAITAN, DAMARYS L ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAITAN, DAMARYS L $459.02 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $604.02 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE, MARLENE RAMOS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DAMARYS L.
